title: Bulcsu's PBR
description: 16x16 normal and specular maps for shaders
body:
![_](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0abd11a2d81ebe841dd6c4be84df5d699d1eb102.png)

I attempt to recreate a realistic PBR affect but in a 16x16 resolution. following Minecraft's default textures.
(Requires a shader that supports Labs PBR)


Shaders Recommended:

Solas

Photon
